ksa_text: Skill in designing and implementing APIs for data services, including RESTful endpoint design, request and response formatting, error handling, authentication integration, and API documentation using OpenAPI or equivalent specifications.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA TF-S-009 (TF, Skill) does not clear the moderate fit inclusion threshold of 0.43. Composite score 0.4003 is insufficient to establish relevance to financial risk analytics, quantitative risk modeling, and data-driven risk assessment at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (onet=0.400, dcwf=0.400, ddat=0.397) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4003 below threshold for moderate fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does TF-domain KSA TF-S-009 (composite 0.4003) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.4003 for TF domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per O*NET 15-2051.00 tools/technology section; DCWF technical foundations competencies for analytics work roles. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Financial Risk Specialist at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms TF domain KSA at composite 0.4003 is not a standard requirement for Financial Risk Specialist at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4003, domain TF, scope moderate fit. High confidence.
